arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Nottingham Forest: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man Utd face Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Saturday at Old Trafford. Preview includes team news, how to watch and more.

arts.ttl: Davies open to Man Utd or Real Madrid move - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies is open to offers, Manchester City target Pepelu, Manchester United and Aston Villa watching Tyler Dibling.

arts.ttl: Amorim backs Manchester United players over dropping rainbow jackets
arts.sum: ‘We need to respect religion of Mazraoui,’ says manager ‘Group decision’ addressed ‘hard issue in a good way’ Ruben Amorim has said the Manchester United team’s decision to show solidarity with Noussair Mazraoui by collectively electing not to wear rainbow-themed jackets to support the LGBTQ+ community should be respected. The players were supposed to walk on to the pitch in the garments before their match with Everton on Sunday but Mazraoui refused on grounds of his Muslim faith and his teammates followed suit, resulting in criticism from the Rainbow Devils, the club’s LGBTQ+ supporters’ group, which said the decision was a “great disappointment”. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim urges Manchester United to ‘run like mad dogs’ in bid to turn season round
arts.sum: A poor start to Erik ten Hag’s third season in charge last month led the Red Devils to turn to the 39-year-old.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim: Dropping plans to wear rainbow jackets ‘hard issue to address’
arts.sum: The move was scrapped as full-back Mazraoui was unwilling to take part, citing his Muslim faith.

arts.ttl: Man Utd are a massive club, not massive team - Amorim
arts.sum: New head coach Ruben Amorim says Manchester United are "a massive club but not a massive team" as he tries to steer the club back towards the top of the English game.

arts.ttl: 'Mad dogs' - Ruben Amorim quotes Jose Mourinho to highlight Manchester United issues
arts.sum: Man United's running stats have been a problem for several years and Ruben Amorim reminded the players of the level they need to operate at.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim breaks silence on Manchester United not wearing LGBTQ+ jacket
arts.sum: Noussair Mazraoui refused to wear a rainbow-themed jacket and Man United players decided to scrap the plan altogether.

arts.ttl: Man Utd problems laid bare by Amorim | 'Massive club, not a massive team'
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has claimed his side are a "massive club but not a massive team" and has highlighted their work-rate off the ball as an area that needs improvement.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals key factor behind Man United stars abandoning plans to wear LGBT rainbow jackets after Noussair Mazraoui refusal - as he insists there is 'no doubt' over the club's values
arts.sum: The gesture went against the religious beliefs of Noussair Mazraoui so the rest of the United players decided not to leave the Moroccan as the odd man out when they walked out at Old Trafford.
